case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CAPITAL ONE VS. SEAN KAVANAGH ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT KAVANAGH, SEAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAVANAGH, SEAN $2,431.64 PRINCIPAL, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,711.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
